title: ItemFulfillmentLineRequest

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

quantity.description: The amount of item being delivered.

remote_created_at.description: When the third party's item fulfillment line item was created.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's item fulfillment line item was updated.

description:
# The ItemFulfillmentLine Object
### Description
The `ItemFulfillmentLine` object represents the specific quantity of a particular product or service that has actually been shipped or delivered against its corresponding order line.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET ItemFulfillment` endpoint and view a company's item fulfillment lines.
